summary: Keep DNS audit, drift detection, filtered-search counters, empty-mirror output, truncation state, BIND export, and ACME reporting aligned with their public contracts.
reason: Cross-zone commands must not miss renamed or retyped records, report a broader scan boundary than requested, change JSON shape before the first sync, accept a DMARC policy at the wrong owner name, hide limited results, emit unloadable BIND records, or report planned ACME zones as successful.
validated_outcome: Focused regression tests cover stable empty-mirror JSON shapes, DMARC owner/value validation, filtered scan metrics, drift across name/type/value/TTL changes, explicit truncation state, per-target ACME outcomes, BIND-safe TXT escaping, and loadable ANAME handling.
